title: angelica triquinata
intro: Angelica triquinata, also known as three-angled angelica or Chinese angelica, is a perennial plant native to China and other parts of East Asia. It is a member of the carrot family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Angelica triquinata include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing fever and improving digestion. Angelica triquinata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
